Localization.Description: A user logged in or logged out

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} from host {src.host} logged out of the system
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged out of the system
The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} from host {src.host} logged in to the system
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the system
